message:
test(serve/parity): seed RuntimeSession rows alongside Sessions for robot-API contract state

The robot-API parity test was creating bare `Session` rows via
`store.CreateSession` but never registering a corresponding
`RuntimeSession`. Several of the robot endpoints under test now
consult the RuntimeSession surface for "is this session attached /
live / has agents" signals that the bare Session rows do not carry.
Without the runtime counterpart the assertions that look at those
fields were drifting toward empty defaults.

Add a matching `store.UpsertRuntimeSession` call for each seeded
session inside the same loop, using the session's Name, ProjectPath,
and CreatedAt, marking Attached=true with AgentCount=1 and a
StaleAfter one hour into the test-clock future. Extract the
`agent` struct literal to a local binding so the subsequent
`store.CreateAgent(agent)` call is easier to read now that the loop
has grown.
